title: Corallodendron sumatranum
taxonomy: Corallodendron sumatranum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Corallodendron which is a part of the plant family Apocynaceae. The Apocynaceae family includes over 5,000 species of plants and is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. These plants are native to tropical regions of Asia, Africa, and Australia. They are characterized by their showy flowers and often woody stems.
